speed.title: Your Rights Guaranteed
speed.desc: We’ve got your back; if anything goes wrong or there's a delay, our support team steps in to fix it instantly.

verified.title: All Services in One Place
verified.desc: From plumbing to carpentry and electricity, we’ve gathered the best experts in every field at the touch of a button.

quality.title: Punctual & Precise
quality.desc: Your time is valuable; our craftsmen strictly stick to their schedules to get your job done without any delays.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you want to know about Dalil Al-Harafeen.
faq.a1: Yes, all services booked through the app are guaranteed by us. In case of dissatisfaction, we redo the work or compensate.
faq.q2: How do I register on the site?
faq.a2: It's easy! If you need a service, register as a 'Client'. If you're a craftsman looking for work, register as a 'Craftsman' and start your journey with us.
faq.q3: How do I request a service as a 'Client'?
faq.a3:
1- Select the craft, fill in your request details (description, location, and time), and post it; craftsmen will start sending you quotes.
2- Selection is based on the profile, overview of the user, as well as experience and geographical location.
faq.q4: How do I work as a 'Craftsman' and receive jobs?
faq.a4: After activating your account, you'll see all available requests. Choose the job that fits you, send your quote, and if the client accepts, you can chat with them to finish the task.

about.title: About Us
about.description: We are not just a directory — we are your trusted partner to reach the best skilled hands for your home and business.
about.teamDesc: The creative and innovative minds that built Dalil Al-Harafeen.

values.trustDesc: We build long-term relationships with our clients and craftsmen based on credibility.
values.integrityDesc: We commit to the highest ethical and professional standards in every transaction.
values.excellenceDesc: We always strive to provide the best possible quality in all services.

about.visionDesc: To become the leading platform in Egypt connecting skilled craftsmen with those who need them. We strive to raise the level of manual work through a safe, transparent, and seamless environment for everyone.
about.storyDesc: The idea stemmed from a simple frustration: finding a reliable plumber or electrician shouldn't be a gamble. We built the Tradesmen Directory to bridge the gap between tradespeople and the community.
about.journeySubtitle: How we started and how we plan for the future

journey.title: Start of Idea
journey.desc: The idea emerged from the urgent need for a reliable system for craftsmen in the Egyptian market.

journey.title: Building the Platform
journey.desc: Our team started working on developing a sophisticated technical system that combines speed and security.

journey.title: Official Launch
journey.desc: The first version of the program was launched and is now available for use by the first group of craftsmen and clients.
